interaction_phrase: Runa Capital Sees Quantum Computing Focus in its Latest Fund
occurrence_sentence: Runa Capital Sees Quantum Computing Focus in its Latest Fund
Runa Capital completed the final closing on its $157 million Fund III, which they say will add more focus on quantum computing, according to TechCrunch.
Runa Capital completed the final closing on its $157 million Fund III, which they say will add more focus on quantum computing, according to TechCrunch.

interaction_phrase: co-founder and managing partner of Runa Capital
occurrence_sentence: Dmitry Chikhachev, co-founder and managing partner of Runa Capital, said in a statement: "We are excited to see many of our portfolio companies' founders investing in Runa Capital III, along with tech-savvy LPs from all parts of the world, who supported us in all of our funds from day one…

In more recent years it has participated or led investments into startups such as NGINX, Zipdrug ($10.8 million); Rollbar this year ($11 million); and Monedo (for €20 million), according to TechCrunch.
